message:
fix: remove overflow-hidden from navbar to show profile dropdown (#10272)

The <nav> element and its right-side flex container both had overflow-hidden,
which clipped the absolutely-positioned UserProfileDropdown menu. Replace with
overflow-x-clip on the nav (preserves horizontal clipping) and remove it from
the flex container (min-w-0 already prevents layout overflow).

Fixes #10270

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
